features.name: Project Context Restoration
features.behavior: Complete project-owned mission, scope, canonical language, product or architecture boundaries, evidence status, and restart assumptions in CONTEXT.md or a declared equivalent.

evidence.detail: Generated startup check passed after CONTEXT.md restored the supplied product facts.

features.name: Self-contained harness engineering marketplace plugin
features.behavior: Expose harness-engineering@agent-tools-marketplace with a self-contained plugin that owns harness-creator, harness-doctor, and harness-archiver, Chinese-first onboarding, and isolated installation/discovery proof.

evidence.detail: Expected RED: 1 test failed because plugins/harness-engineering/.codex-plugin/plugin.json does not exist.
